calls.query: const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,260p' AGENTS.md && sed -n '1,320p' .github/prompts/predict.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"cat schemas/prediction.schema.json && cat schemas/agent_tooling.schema.json && cat schemas/agent_flags.schema.json && uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73281629 --event evt-petition-disposition","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts paths --court scotus --docket 73281629 --event evt-petition-disposition; rg --files data/cases/scotus/73281629 | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"find data/cases/scotus/73281629 -maxdepth 8 -type f -print | sort; find . -path '*73281629*' -type f -print | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"cat data/cases/scotus/73281629/events/evt-petition-disposition/event.yaml; cat data/cases/scotus/73281629/record/snapshots/2026-07-16.json; cat data/cases/scotus/73281629/record/documents/documents.json; wc -l -c data/cases/scotus/73281629/record/documents/*.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"cat data/cases/scotus/73281629/record/documents/questions-presented.txt; sed -n '1,1200p' data/cases/scotus/73281629/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":40000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '150,560p' data/cases/scotus/73281629/record/documents/petition.txt; sed -n '1,520p' data/cases/scotus/73281629/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":50000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '1,300p' data/cases/scotus/73281629/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '301,650p' data/cases/scotus/73281629/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":35000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '651,900p' data/cases/scotus/73281629/record/documents/brief-in-opposition.txt; cat data/cases/scotus/73281629/record/context.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n \"Modern discretionary-cert|Segment base rate|relist|CVSG|originating circuit|2025 Term|Term 2025|Paid|salience\" metrics/statpack.md | head -120; sed -n '1,260p' metrics/statpack.md","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '260,560p' metrics/statpack.md; jq '.scotus_cert_by_term // .cert_by_term // keys' metrics/statpack.json 2>/dev/null | head -100","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq '.sections | keys, .terms' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"jq '{section_titles: [.sections[] | (.title // .name // .id)], terms: .terms}' metrics/statpack.json","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":25000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --help","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts query --court scotus --era 2020s --citation '29 U.S.C. § 1024(b)(4)' --limit 8","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);
const xs = ALL_TOOLS.filter(x => /courtlistener|court listener/i.test(x.name+" "+x.description)); text(xs);

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"claims administration agreement\" \"1024(b)(4)\"",filed_before:"2026-07-17",fields:["id","caseName","citation","dateFiled","court","absolute_url","snippet"],num_results:10}); for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) { if (c.type === "image") image(c); else if (c.type === "text") text(c.text); }

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",q:"\"administrative services agreement\" \"1024(b)(4)\"",filed_before:"2026-07-17",fields:["caseName","citation","dateFiled","court","absolute_url"],num_results:10}); for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) { if (c.type === "image") image(c); else if (c.type === "text") text(c.text); }

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__search({type:"o",case_name:"M. S. v. Premera Blue Cross",court:["ca10"],filed_after:"2024-09-30",filed_before:"2024-10-02",fields:["caseName","citation","dateFiled","court","absolute_url","opinions"],num_results:3}); for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) { if (c.type === "image") image(c); else if (c.type === "text") text(c.text); }

const r = await tools.mcp__courtlistener__get_endpoint_item({endpoint_id:"opinions",item_id:10594949,fields:["id","html_with_citations"]}); for (const c of (r?.content ?? [])) { if (c.type === "image") image(c); else if (c.type === "text") text(c.text); }

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ; git status --short --untracked-files=all; find data/cases/scotus/73281629/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T000329Z -maxdepth 1 -type f -print 2>/dev/null | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":10000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"rg -n '^(12|13|14|15|16) $' data/cases/scotus/73281629/record/documents/petition.txt | head -20","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":5000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"sed -n '540,720p' data/cases/scotus/73281629/record/documents/petition.txt","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":18000}); text(r.output);

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"find data/cases -path '*/predictions/codex-baseline/*/prediction.json' -print | head -3 | xargs -r -n1 sh -c 'echo \"$0\"; sed -n \"1,220p\" \"$0\"'; find data/cases -path '*/predictions/codex-baseline/*/tooling.json' -print | head -1 | xargs -r sed -n '1,220p'","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":10000,"max_output_tokens":20000}); text(r.output);

const patch = "*** Begin Patch
*** Add File: /home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai/data/cases/scotus/73281629/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T000329Z/prediction.json
+{
+  "schema_version": "1.0",
+  "case_id": "scotus/73281629",
+  "event_id": "evt-petition-disposition",
+  "predictor_id": "codex-baseline",
+  "engine": "codex",
+  "model": "gpt-5.6-sol",
+  "run_id": "20260717T000329Z",
+  "created_at": "2026-07-1

const r = await tools.exec_command({cmd:"set -o pipefail
OUT=data/cases/scotus/73281629/events/evt-petition-disposition/predictions/codex-baseline/20260717T000329Z
jq empty "$OUT/prediction.json" "$OUT/tooling.json"
UV_CACHE_DIR=/tmp/uv-cache uv run fedcourts validate data
git status --short --untracked-files=all
find "$OUT" -maxdepth 1 -type f -printf '%f\n' | sort","workdir":"/home/runner/work/fedcourtsai/fedcourtsai","yield_time_ms":30000,"max_output_tokens":30000}); text(r.output
